---
title: "Untitled"
format: html
---


```{r setting up workspace}
# ======================================================================
# 00. SETUP
# ======================================================================
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readxl)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(purrr)
  library(glue)
  library(IPDfromKM)
  library(survival)
})

set.seed(42)

options(
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  dplyr.summarise.inform = FALSE
)
```


```{r}

# ======================================================================
# 01. CONFIGURATION
# ======================================================================
rm(list = ls())

excel_path <- "data/extracted_points.xlsx"

# Output directory for saved IPDs
out_dir <- "data/reconstructed_ipd"
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Map sheets to endpoint names (as you described)
endpoints <- tibble::tibble(
  sheet = 1:4,
  endpoint = c(
    "MD_RSV_LRTI",      # Sheet 1: Medically attended RSV-LRTI (Simões 2023)
    "RSV_Hospitalization", # Sheet 2 : RSV hospitalization(Ho) (Simões 2023)
    "Severe_RSV_LRTI",  # Sheet 3 : Severe RSV-LRTI (Kampmann 2023)
    "Any_RSV_LRTI"      # Sheet 4 : RSV-LRTI (any) (Kampmann 2023)
  )
)

time_cfg <- list(
  MD_RSV_LRTI = list(
    t_max  = 150,
    trisk  = c(0, 30, 60, 90, 120, 150)
  ),
  RSV_Hospitalization = list(
    t_max  = 150,
    trisk  = c(0, 30, 60, 90, 120, 150)
  ),
  Severe_RSV_LRTI = list(
    t_max  = 180,
    trisk  = c(0, 30, 60, 90, 120, 150, 180)
  ),
  Any_RSV_LRTI = list(
    t_max  = 180,
    trisk  = c(0, 30, 60, 90, 120, 150, 180)
  )
)

risk_tables <- list(
  MD_RSV_LRTI = list(
    placebo    = c(786, 772, 756, 737, 729, 724),
    nirsevimab = c(1564, 1553, 1546, 1538, 1527, 1519)
  ),
  RSV_Hospitalization = list(
    placebo    = c(786, 778, 769, 761, 757, 753),
    nirsevimab = c(1564, 1554, 1547, 1540, 1535, 1529)
  ),
  Severe_RSV_LRTI = list(
    placebo    = c(3480,3292,2973,2899,2833,2776,2749),
    nirsevimab = c(3495, 3349, 3042, 2981, 2916, 2867, 2820)
  ),
  Any_RSV_LRTI = list(
    placebo    = c(3480,3288, 2964, 2879, 2804, 2738, 2700),
    nirsevimab = c(3495,3348, 3035, 2968, 2898, 2845, 2792)
  )
)

arm_map <- c(
  "placebo" = "placebo",
  "rsvpref" = "nirsevimab",   # Kampmann label
  "rsvpref " = "nirsevimab",  # defensive
  "rsvprefv" = "nirsevimab"   
)


```


```{r}

# ======================================================================
# 02. UTILITIES / VALIDATION
# ======================================================================

stop_if <- function(cond, msg) {
  if (isTRUE(cond)) stop(msg, call. = FALSE)
}

inform <- function(...) message(glue::glue(..., .envir = parent.frame()))

standardize_km_columns <- function(df) {
  # Accept common column names and standardize to: time, surv, treat
  # You have: time, proportion, treat
  nm <- names(df)

  # time
  time_col <- nm[str_to_lower(nm) %in% c("time", "t", "days", "day")]
  stop_if(length(time_col) != 1, "Could not uniquely identify time column.")

  # survival/proportion
  surv_col <- nm[str_to_lower(nm) %in% c("surv", "survival", "proportion", "s")]
  stop_if(length(surv_col) != 1, "Could not uniquely identify survival/proportion column.")

  # treat/arm
  treat_col <- nm[str_to_lower(nm) %in% c("treat", "arm", "group", "trt")]
  stop_if(length(treat_col) != 1, "Could not uniquely identify treatment/arm column.")

  df |>
    transmute(
      time  = as.numeric(.data[[time_col]]),
      surv  = as.numeric(.data[[surv_col]]),
      treat = as.character(.data[[treat_col]])
    )
}

clean_km_arm <- function(df_arm, time_round = 2) {
  df_arm |>
    filter(!is.na(time), !is.na(surv)) |>
    transmute(
      time = as.numeric(time),
      surv = as.numeric(surv)
    ) |>
    mutate(
      time = pmax(time, 0),                  # clamp negative time
      time = round(time, time_round),        # reduce digitization jitter
      surv = pmin(pmax(surv, 0), 1)          # clamp survival
    ) |>
    bind_rows(tibble::tibble(time = 0, surv = 1)) |>
    arrange(time) |>
    group_by(time) |>
    summarise(surv = min(surv), .groups = "drop") |>  # step-like
    mutate(surv = cummin(surv))                          # enforce non-increasing
}

km_critical_checks <- function(km_df, endpoint, t_max) {
  # Data-level checks before splitting arms
  stop_if(nrow(km_df) < 10, glue("[{endpoint}] Too few digitized points (<10)."))

  stop_if(any(!is.finite(km_df$time)), glue("[{endpoint}] Non-finite time values found."))
  stop_if(any(!is.finite(km_df$surv)), glue("[{endpoint}] Non-finite survival values found."))
 
 if (any(km_df$time < 0, na.rm = TRUE)) {
  n_bad <- sum(km_df$time < 0, na.rm = TRUE)
  min_time <- suppressWarnings(min(km_df$time, na.rm = TRUE))
  warning(glue::glue(
    "[{endpoint}] {n_bad} time values < 0 detected (min={round(min_time, 6)}). ",
    "They will be clamped to 0 during cleaning."
  ), call. = FALSE)
}


  if (any(km_df$surv < 0 | km_df$surv > 1, na.rm = TRUE)) {
  n_bad1 <- sum(km_df$surv < 0 | km_df$surv > 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  max_over1 <- suppressWarnings(max(km_df$surv - 1, na.rm = TRUE))
  min_under1 <- suppressWarnings(min(km_df$surv, na.rm = TRUE))
  warning(glue::glue(
    "[{endpoint}] {n_bad1} survival values outside [0,1] detected (min={round(min_under1,6)}, max_over_1={round(max_over1,6)}). ",
    "They will be clamped to [0,1] during cleaning."
  ), call. = FALSE)
}


  # Check for presence of both arms
  arms <- sort(unique(km_df$treat))
  stop_if(length(arms) < 2, glue("[{endpoint}] Only one arm detected in treat column: {toString(arms)}"))

  # Inform about time coverage
  inform("[{endpoint}] digitized time range: {min(km_df$time, na.rm=TRUE)} to {max(km_df$time, na.rm=TRUE)} (target max = {t_max})")

  # Arm monotonicity check (raw)
  mono <- km_df |>
    group_by(treat) |>
    arrange(time) |>
    summarise(
      n_increases = sum(diff(surv) > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_increase = suppressWarnings(max(diff(surv), na.rm = TRUE)),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  mono
}

ensure_tmax <- function(df_arm, t_max) {
  # Ensure curve extends to t_max (required for consistent preprocessing)
  df_arm <- df_arm |> filter(time <= t_max)

  if (!any(abs(df_arm$time - t_max) < 1e-10)) {
    last <- df_arm |> slice_tail(n = 1)
    df_arm <- bind_rows(df_arm, mutate(last, time = t_max))
  }
  df_arm
}

validate_risk_table <- function(endpoint, trisk, risk_entry) {
  stop_if(any(is.na(risk_entry$placebo)) || any(is.na(risk_entry$nirsevimab)),
          glue("[{endpoint}] Risk table missing. Fill risk_tables[['{endpoint}']]."))

  stop_if(length(risk_entry$placebo) != length(trisk),
          glue("[{endpoint}] placebo nrisk length != length(trisk)."))

  stop_if(length(risk_entry$nirsevimab) != length(trisk),
          glue("[{endpoint}] nirsevimab nrisk length != length(trisk)."))

  stop_if(any(diff(risk_entry$placebo) > 0),
          glue("[{endpoint}] placebo nrisk increases over time (should be non-increasing)."))

  stop_if(any(diff(risk_entry$nirsevimab) > 0),
          glue("[{endpoint}] nirsevimab nrisk increases over time (should be non-increasing)."))
}

```


```{r}

# ======================================================================
# 03. RECONSTRUCTION CORE (ONE ENDPOINT)
# ======================================================================

reconstruct_one_endpoint <- function(excel_path, sheet, endpoint, time_cfg, risk_tables, arm_map) {

  inform("============================================================")
  inform("Endpoint: {endpoint} (sheet {sheet})")
  inform("============================================================")

  cfg <- time_cfg[[endpoint]]
    stop_if(is.null(cfg), glue("[{endpoint}] Missing time_cfg entry."))

    t_max <- cfg$t_max
    trisk <- cfg$trisk

  # 1) Load raw
  raw <- read_excel(excel_path, sheet = sheet) |>
  standardize_km_columns() |>
  mutate(
    treat = str_to_lower(str_trim(treat)),
    treat = str_replace_all(treat, "\\s+", ""),   # remove spaces inside (e.g., "RSV preF")
    treat = recode(treat, !!!arm_map)
  )

raw <- raw |>
  mutate(
    time = pmax(time, 0),
    surv = pmin(pmax(surv, 0), 1)
  )

stop_if(any(is.na(raw$treat)), glue("[{endpoint}] Unmapped treat labels found. Check arm_map."))


  # 2) Critical checks (raw)
  mono_raw <- km_critical_checks(raw, endpoint, t_max)
  inform("[{endpoint}] Raw monotonicity check:")
  print(mono_raw)

  # 3) Split + clean each arm
    km_p <- raw |> filter(treat == "placebo")    |> clean_km_arm() |> ensure_tmax(t_max)
    km_n <- raw |> filter(treat == "nirsevimab") |> clean_km_arm() |> ensure_tmax(t_max)


  stop_if(nrow(km_p) < 5, glue("[{endpoint}] Placebo curve too sparse after cleaning."))
  stop_if(nrow(km_n) < 5, glue("[{endpoint}] Nirsevimab curve too sparse after cleaning."))

  # 4) Validate risk table
  risk_entry <- risk_tables[[endpoint]]
  stop_if(is.null(risk_entry), glue("[{endpoint}] No risk table entry found in risk_tables list."))
  validate_risk_table(endpoint, trisk, risk_entry)

  # 5) Preprocess + reconstruct IPD
  pre_p <- preprocess(dat = km_p, trisk = trisk, nrisk = risk_entry$placebo,    maxy = 1)
  pre_n <- preprocess(dat = km_n, trisk = trisk, nrisk = risk_entry$nirsevimab, maxy = 1)

  est_p <- getIPD(prep = pre_p, armID = 0)
  est_n <- getIPD(prep = pre_n, armID = 1)

  ipd <- bind_rows(
    est_p$IPD |> mutate(treat = "placebo"),
    est_n$IPD |> mutate(treat = "nirsevimab")
  ) |>
    mutate(
      treat  = factor(treat, levels = c("placebo", "nirsevimab")),
      time   = as.numeric(time),
      status = as.integer(status),
      endpoint = endpoint
    )

  # 6) IPD diagnostics summary
  diag <- list(
    precision_placebo = est_p$precision,
    precision_nirsev  = est_n$precision,
    ks_placebo = est_p$kstest,
    ks_nirsev  = est_n$kstest,
    n_by_arm = table(ipd$treat),
    events_by_arm = table(ipd$treat, ipd$status),
    time_summary = summary(ipd$time)
  )

  inform("[{endpoint}] N by arm:")
  print(diag$n_by_arm)
  inform("[{endpoint}] Events by arm (status=1 is event):")
  print(diag$events_by_arm)

  # 7) Visual check: reconstructed KM vs digitized points (per arm)
  fit <- survfit(Surv(time, status) ~ treat, data = ipd)

  sf <- data.frame(
    time = fit$time,
    surv = fit$surv,
    treat = rep(names(fit$strata), fit$strata)
  ) |>
    mutate(treat = sub("treat=", "", treat))

  dig <- bind_rows(
    km_p |> mutate(treat = "placebo"),
    km_n |> mutate(treat = "nirsevimab")
  )

  p_overlay <- ggplot() +
    geom_step(data = sf, aes(x = time, y = surv, colour = treat), linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_point(data = dig, aes(x = time, y = surv, colour = treat), alpha = 0.35, size = 1) +
    facet_wrap(~treat) +
    labs(
      x = "Days since dose",
      y = glue("Survival (no {endpoint})"),
      colour = "Treatment",
      title = glue("KM overlay: reconstructed IPD vs digitized points ({endpoint})")
    ) +
    theme_bw()

  # 8) Save IPD + metadata bundle
  bundle <- list(
    endpoint = endpoint,
    sheet = sheet,
    t_max = t_max,
    trisk = trisk,
    nrisk = risk_entry,
    km_clean = list(placebo = km_p, nirsevimab = km_n),
    ipd = ipd,
    diagnostics = diag,
    est = list(placebo = est_p, nirsevimab = est_n)
  )

  list(bundle = bundle, plot = p_overlay)
}

```

```{r}
#endpoints1 <- endpoints |>
#    filter(sheet == 4)
```

```{r}

# ======================================================================
# 04. RUN ALL ENDPOINTS + SAVE
# ======================================================================

results <- endpoints |>
  mutate(
    out_rds = file.path(out_dir, paste0(endpoint, ".rds"))
  ) |>
  pmap(function(sheet, endpoint, out_rds) {

    res <- reconstruct_one_endpoint(
        excel_path   = excel_path,
        sheet        = sheet,
        endpoint     = endpoint,
        time_cfg     = time_cfg,
        risk_tables  = risk_tables,
        arm_map      = arm_map
)

    # Save the FULL bundle (IPD + cleaned KM + metadata + diagnostics)
    saveRDS(res$bundle, out_rds)
    inform("Saved: {out_rds}")

    # Return minimal object
    list(endpoint = endpoint, out_rds = out_rds, plot = res$plot)
  })

# Print paths
tibble::tibble(
  endpoint = map_chr(results, "endpoint"),
  out_rds  = map_chr(results, "out_rds")
)

```


```{r}
# ======================================================================
# 05. POST-RUN CHECKS
# ======================================================================

# Show overlay plots (one by one)
walk(results, ~print(.x$plot))

# Example: read one saved IPD bundle
md_bundle <- readRDS(file.path(out_dir, "Any_RSV_LRTI.rds"))

# Access reconstructed IPD
ipd_md <- md_bundle$ipd

# Cox model (example)
cox_md <- coxph(Surv(time, status) ~ treat, data = ipd_md)
summary(cox_md)


```
